scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @devflow/api" "npm run dev -w @devflow/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @devflow/shared && npm run build -w @devflow/api && npm run build -w @devflow/web
scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:generate -w @devflow/api && npm run build -w @devflow/shared && npm run build -w @devflow/api && npm run db:deploy -w @devflow/api && npm run build -w @devflow/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @devflow/api && npm run lint -w @devflow/web
